recommendations.title: Alone in the Dark
recommendations.overview: A quartet of murderous psychopaths break out of a mental hospital during a power blackout and lay siege to their doctor's house.

recommendations.title: A Nightmare on Elm Street Part 2: Freddy's Revenge
recommendations.overview: A teenage boy is haunted in his dreams by deceased child murderer Freddy Krueger, who is out to possess him in order to continue his reign of terror in the real world.

recommendations.title: The Hidden
recommendations.overview: When average, law-abiding citizens suddenly turn to a life of hedonistic behavior and violent crime, Detective Tom Beck is tasked with helping young FBI agent Lloyd Gallagher determine the cause.

Office employee Barry Thomas is caught in a "time bounce" caused by a glitch in the company's secret project. Now the same day occurs again and again - and Barry's the only one who can do anything about it, including saving the life of beautiful rese

recommendations.title: Rise of the Guardians
recommendations.overview: When an evil spirit known as Pitch lays down the gauntlet to take over the world, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs and imagination of children all over the world.

recommendations.title: The Exorcism of God
recommendations.overview: An American priest working in Mexico is considered a saint by many local parishioners. However, due to a botched exorcism, he carries a secret that’s eating him alive until he gets an opportunity to face his demon one final time.

recommendations.title: Me Against You: Mr. S's Vendetta
recommendations.overview: A young couple who makes popular YouTube videos for children sets out to win an award, but an evil mastermind stands in the way of their success.

recommendations.title: Ju-On: Black Ghost
recommendations.overview: The supernatural grudge manifests itself by way of a strange cyst growing in the body of a young woman, slowly draining all life from her in revenge for... what?

recommendations.title: Lying and Stealing
recommendations.overview: Hoping to leave his criminal lifestyle behind him, a successful art thief teams up with a sexy con woman to pull off the ultimate heist and set himself free.

recommendations.title: Above the Shadows
recommendations.overview: A young woman who has faded to the point of becoming invisible must find her way back with the help of the one man who can see her.
